sql:
SELECT 
    TAIPH.API_ID
   	,TAIPH.PROC_SERIAL 
   	, TAIPH.RESULT_CD
    , TAIPH.RESULT_MSG
    , TAIPH.RETRY_PROC
    , TAIPH.REQUEST_PARAM
   	, TAM.API_NAME
   	, TAM.API_URL
   	, TAM.API_DESC
   	, TO_CHAR(TAIPH.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME
    , TO_CHAR(TAM.UPDATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as UPDATE_TIME
    , TISM.SYSTEM_NM
    , TAARH.API_URL as TARGETURL
    ,CASE
        WHEN EXEC_MODE_CD = 'B' THEN 'Batch'
        WHEN EXEC_MODE_CD = 'F' THEN 'SFTP'
        ELSE 'OnDemand'
    END AS EXEC_MODE_CD
    ,CASE
        WHEN RESULT_CD = 'S' THEN 'SUCCESS'
        ELSE 'FAIL'
    END AS RESULT_CD_DESC
    FROM DATAHUB.TB_API_INTRL_PROC_HIST TAIPH
    LEFT JOIN DATAHUB.TB_API_MST TAM ON TAM.API_ID = TAIPH.API_ID
    LEFT JOIN DATAHUB.TB_INTRL_SYSTEM_MST TISM ON TAM.SYSTEM_ID  = TISM.SYSTEM_ID
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT API_ID, API_URL
        FROM DATAHUB.TB_API_AUTH_REQ_HIST TAARH
        WHERE SYSTEM_ID IS NOT null and status_cd = 'GRANT'
        GROUP BY API_ID, API_URL
    ) TAARH ON TAARH.API_ID = TAIPH.API_ID
    WHERE 1=1
            AND TAIPH.API_ID = 53
            AND TAIPH.RESULT_CD = 'S'
            LIMIT 20 OFFSET 0
